meaning: reaction [化]维蒂希反应(一种有机合成技术)
examples: Also, the high stereoselectivity of the Wittig olefination has been well rationalized.
A new path for the preparation of leaf alcohol with 3-chloropropanol, triphenylphosphine and propionaldehyde through Wittig reaction was studied.
A series of novel purpurin-18 imide derivatives with long absorption wavelength were synthesized through Wittig reaction of methyl pheophorbide-a.
Peter Wittig, Germany's U.N. ambassador and the current president of the U.N.
Huberta von Voss Wittig and Sheila Lyall Grant, the wives of the top German and British envoys in New York, respectively, say the video was made on their own initiative.
